as plague, whooping cough, diphtheria
and leprosy.
16. Microbes are used for commercial and
industrial production of certain chemicals
like organic acids, alcohols and enzymes.
Which of the following is incorrect
regarding this? (Pg. 183, E)
A) Aspergillus — fungus — citric acid
B) Acetobacter aceti — bacteria — vinegar
C) Clostridium butylicum - protozoan -
butyric acid
D) Lactobacillus - bacteria - lactic acid.
17. The substance which is used in detergent
formulations and helpful in removing oily
stains are — (Pg. 183, E)
A) Pectinases B) Proteases
C) Lipases D) Statins
18. Bottled juices are clarified by the enzyme-
(Pg. 183, E)
A) Pectinase and lipases
B) Pectinase and peptidase
C) Pectinase and protease
D) Pectinase only
19. Match the following columns: (Pg. 183, M)
[| Cohmal | | Comal |
lowering agent
Streptokinase 2 | Immunosuppressive
ll =
c) | Statins 3 | Clot buster for
I a =
ethanol
Which of the following is the correct
option?
20. How many of the following statements are
correct? (Pg. 183, H)
I. A bioactive molecule, cyclosporin A, is
produced by the fungus Trichoderma
polysporum.
